description:
`list.go:95` defaults `Statuses: ["open", "in_progress"]` when `--status` is not given. When a user passes `--status in_review` alone (without `--all`), the filter behavior is non-obvious — the explicit user argument may intersect with the default rather than replace it, returning empty for statuses outside the default whitelist.

**Fix:** User-specified `--status` (one or more) **replaces** the default whitelist. Document the precedence in `bw list --help`. If the current behavior is intentional, clarify it in the help text and in a comment at `list.go:95`.

**Acceptance:**
- `bw list --status in_review` on a repo containing `in_review` tickets returns those tickets, not empty.
- `bw list` (no `--status`) still defaults to open+in_progress.
- `bw list --all` still overrides to show everything.
title: bw list --status X default-whitelist semantics
